creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 176901
Update cmake to 3.6.3

kde@ would like to request an exp-run for updating CMake to 3.6.3 [1]. 

Patch attached and also available here:
http://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/update__devel_cmake__3.6.3.v1


[1] https://blog.kitware.com/cmake-3-6-3-available-for-download/
